description: When creating a new listing, an agent needs to verify the official property tax amount and check for any special assessments.

nodes.task_description: Identify the property's Parcel ID Number (APN).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly finds the property's APN.

nodes.task_description: Access the county tax assessor's public records database using the APN.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully navigates to the property's tax record page.

nodes.task_description: Extract the most recent annual tax amount and note any Mello-Roos or other special assessments to include in the listing disclosures.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately records all relevant tax information.
